title: cordylanthus rigidus var. littoralis
intro: Cordylanthus rigidus var. littoralis, also known as Beach Plume, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. It is native to the coastal regions of California and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems.
